articles.title: Oil falls and shares rebound after Trump says talks have been held to end war
articles.summary: Energy prices fall and stock markets rebound after the US president says "very good and productive" talks have been held.

articles.title: UN warns Earth's climate being 'pushed beyond its limits' as El Niño looms
articles.summary: The Earth's climate is further out of balance than at any time in recorded history, the UN's weather agency says.

articles.title: HK police can now demand phone passwords under new national security rules
articles.summary: Those who do not comply can be jailed for up to a year and fined up to HK$100,000 ($12,700; £9,600).

articles.title: OnlyFans owner Leonid Radvinsky dies at 43
articles.summary: Leo Radvinsky became a billionaire after investing in the site, known for its pornographic content.

articles.title: Nigerian police arrest 15 after viral videos of alleged sexual assault at festival
articles.summary: The videos sparked widespread anger, leading to the hashtag #StopRapingWomen to trend on social media.

articles.title: BTS agency shares drop after comeback show turnout falls short
articles.summary: The concert was attended by an estimated 104,000 fans, much lower than the expected 260,000.

articles.title: Kenyan ex-foreign minister arrested and accused of staging his disappearance
articles.summary: The reported disappearance of Raphael Tuju had led to claims he may have been abducted.

articles.title: France's former Socialist Prime Minister Lionel Jospin dies at 88
articles.summary: Jospin was head of government from 1997 to 2002 and is credited with bringing in the 35-hour working week.

articles.title: Australia's ABC staff to go on strike for first time in 20 years
articles.summary: The 24-hour long strike is expected to disrupt live television and radio broadcasts.

articles.title: France's Socialists hold on to power in major cities in election boost for mainstream
articles.summary: Paris and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns.
